title: ChessBits
text: Home * Periodical * ChessBits ChessBits [1] ChessBits , was a German computer chess periodical, first released in 1999 by Marcus Kästner . 21 issues were released until 2003, when the unexpected death of Marcus later partner and co-editor Detlef Pordzik was the main reason ChessBits was discontinued. Selected Articles [ edit ] Marcus Kästner ( 2000 ). Interview with Ed Schröder . ChessBits, No. 8, hosted by Ed Schröder Alwin Gruber ( 2001 ). Schachcomputer die Geschichte schrieben - Der Novag Savant . ChessBits , 01-2001, pdf hosted and slightly modified by Hein Veldhuis  » Savant Detlef Pordzik ( 2002 ). Ein Brettcomputer im Königsformat - Der Excalibur Grandmaster .
